ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_bird" TEXT /* State bird species (if applicable) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "year_in_union" INTEGER /* Year the state joined the union */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state this demographic entry belongs to */,
  "population" REAL /* Population figure for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population figure was recorded */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race demographics */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity demographics */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age demographics */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex demographics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state this capital belongs to */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the capital */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the capital in square miles */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the capital in feet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the capital record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the capital record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birds" (
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "bird_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the bird species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the bird species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the bird species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bird record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bird record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_birds" (
  "state_bird_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state-bird relationship */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bird species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state-bird relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state-bird relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_bird_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_birds_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_birds_bird_id FOREIGN KEY ("bird_id") REFERENCES birds ("bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the state data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the state data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state this education entry belongs to */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate for the state */,
  "bachelor_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
